hooks.command: errors=$(find src/ bin/ -name '*.js' 2>/dev/null | xargs -I{} node --check {} 2>&1 | grep -v '^$'); [ -z "$errors" ] || { printf 'JS syntax error — blocked:\n%s\n' "$errors" >&2; exit 2; }

cmd=$(cat | python3 -c "import sys,json;d=json.load(sys.stdin);print(d.get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null || echo ''); [ -z "$cmd" ] && exit 0; echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'rm -rf|curl.+\|.+bash|wget.+\|.+sh' && { echo 'Blocked: destructive command — run manually if intentional' >&2; exit 2; }; echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git push -(-force|-f\b)' && { echo 'Blocked: force push — run manually after review' >&2; exit 2; }; echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'npm publish' && { echo 'Blocked: npm publish — run manually after version bump and changelog review' >&2; exit 2; }; exit 0

printf '
\033[1;36m=== create-wp-plugin — dev context ===\033[0m
'; printf 'Stack : Node.js ESM | Commander | Inquirer | Chalk | Ora
'; printf 'Test  : npm test            (node --test tests/**/*.test.js)
'; printf 'Lint  : npm run lint        (eslint src/ bin/)
'; printf 'Run   : node bin/create-wp-plugin.js [slug] [flags]
'; printf 'Tpls  : src/templates/      ({{TOKEN}} replaced by template-engine.js)
'; printf 'Valid : src/validator.js    (slug, namespace, prefix, version rules)
'; printf '
New feature checklist:
'; printf '  1  src/prompts.js        — add checkbox + flatten to answers.hasX
'; printf '  2  src/template-engine.js — add token(s) in buildTokens()
'; printf '  3  src/scaffold.js       — add conditional writeFile() call
'; printf '  4  src/templates/        — create .tpl file
'; printf '  5  tests/               — add tests for token + validator
'; printf '  6  .github/workflows/ci.yml — add smoke-test assertion
'; printf '\033[2mRecent commits:\033[0m
'; git log --oneline -5 2>/dev/null | sed 's/^/  /' || true; printf '
'
